title: LitLoom 4.0.1
message: This update adds in-app auto update, visible download progress, faster first paint, and cleaner navigation.
changelog: Added native in-app update checks with download progress and Android installer handoff.
Audiobook and player downloads now show active progress instead of silent button presses.
Home and Discover now render progressively so slow rows do not blank the whole page.
Bottom tabs no longer restore stale Discover state when switching back home.
Discover header was simplified to one search entry point.
Download and reader requests now preserve binary Accept headers.
